title: The Everything Code — global liquidity & cycle dashboard

headline.metric: GMI Total Global Liquidity Index (central-bank balance sheets netted + M2, summed across the major economies in USD; see n_economies)

global_m2.note: broad-money component, 47 economies (daily); a part of the Total Liquidity picture, not the headline

signals.read: GMI Total Global Liquidity leads Bitcoin
GMI Total Global Liquidity leads the Nasdaq 100
Total Liquidity YoY (3m) leads the ISM manufacturing cycle

panels.title: Liquidity leads Bitcoin
panels.claim: liquidity leads BTC ~90d (BTC ~90% corr); watch the lead compressing toward 0 — faster transmission / reflexivity

panels.title: Liquidity leads Nasdaq 100
panels.claim: liquidity leads NDX (~97.5% corr) — the cleanest of the two

panels.title: Global M2 — Year-on-year
panels.claim: the cycle-axis primary — rising = risk added

panels.title: ISM vs Global Total Liquidity
panels.claim: liquidity leads the ISM — the middle domino of the EC chain

panels.title: Business-cycle composite (GDP-weighted)
panels.claim: the cycle state; rising through 50 = expansion

panels.title: Cyclical impulse vs the broad composite
panels.claim: the impulse leads the composite — earliest cycle turn signal

panels.title: ISM vs GMI Financial Conditions Index
panels.claim: FCI is the earliest domino — financial conditions lead liquidity

panels.title: The Everything Code Dominoes
panels.claim: the order the cycle falls: financial conditions -> liquidity -> ISM -> asset prices; each with a lead time

series.title: GMI Total Global Liquidity
series.description: Broad money across 47 economies valued in USD at spot FX and summed — the Everything Code headline liquidity index.

btc.title: Bitcoin price
btc.description: Risk-asset overlay; lags global liquidity by ~10 weeks.

ndx.title: Nasdaq 100 price
ndx.description: Risk-asset overlay layered against the liquidity line.

total_liquidity.series.title: GMI Total Global Liquidity
total_liquidity.series.source: TradingView ECONOMICS (CB balance sheets + M2) + FX
total_liquidity.series.description: GMI-method Global Total Liquidity: central-bank balance sheets (netted) + M2 across 10 major economies in USD. Daily (FX-driven; monthly stocks forward-filled). The headline regime measure; reproduces GMI's ~8%/yr growth and leads risk assets.

total_liquidity.components.balance_sheet.title: Central-bank balance sheets (index component)
total_liquidity.components.balance_sheet.description: Netted central-bank balance sheets summed in USD — a component of the Total Liquidity Index (shrinking under QT everywhere except China).

total_liquidity.components.m2.title: Broad money M2 (index component)
total_liquidity.components.m2.description: Broad money summed in USD — the private-credit component of the Total Liquidity Index.

total_liquidity.monetization.bank_securi.title: US bank securities held (deficit monetization)
total_liquidity.monetization.bank_securi.description: Treasury & agency securities held by US banks (total bank credit − loans, ~$5.7tn). Banks absorbing Treasury bill issuance — the deficit-monetization engine GMI expects to extend the cycle. Rising.

total_liquidity.monetization.reverse_rep.title: Fed reverse repo (RRP)
total_liquidity.monetization.reverse_rep.description: Overnight reverse-repo balance — the buffer that funded bill issuance in 2023-24. Now drained to ~zero, so the monetization baton has passed to the banking system.

big.lfpr.title: Labour force participation
big.lfpr.description: Share of the population in the labour force.

big.births.title: Birth rate
big.births.description: Structural demographic input to the long cycle.

big.debt.title: Federal debt % GDP
big.debt.description: Federal debt held by the public as a share of GDP.

big.interest.title: Interest payments
big.interest.description: Federal interest expense — the fiscal-dominance pressure.

big.prod.title: Labor productivity YoY
big.prod.description: US nonfarm labor productivity, output per hour, YoY %. Paired with ISM to identify the cycle's channel: productivity rising with ISM = intelligence channel; flat = old cycle. Confirms, does not lead.

cycle.neworders.title: ISM new orders
cycle.neworders.description: Forward-looking demand component of the PMI.

cycle.capex.title: Capex % GDP
cycle.capex.description: Nonresidential fixed investment as a share of GDP.

cycle.bc_composite.title: Business-cycle composite
cycle.bc_composite.description: Blended cycle gauge across the PMI/orders set.

cycle.cyclical_impulse.title: Cyclical impulse
cycle.cyclical_impulse.description: Rate-of-change impulse in the cycle composite.

cycle.fci.title: GMI FCI
cycle.fci.description: Financial Conditions Index reconstruction; leads ISM ~9 months.

cycle.fci_exoil.title: FCI ex-oil
cycle.fci_exoil.description: FCI variant excluding the oil contribution.

exp.twexp_yy.title: Taiwan exports YoY (semis proxy)
exp.twexp_yy.description: Taiwan export growth — a semiconductor-cycle bellwether.

exp.krexp_yy.title: South Korea exports YoY
exp.krexp_yy.description: Korean export growth — early global-trade signal.

exp.jpmto_yy.title: Japan machine tool orders YoY
exp.jpmto_yy.description: Capex-cycle leading indicator from Japanese machine tools.

infl.accel.title: CPI 2nd derivative
infl.accel.description: Acceleration/deceleration of inflation (rate of change of YoY).

labor.ot_yoy.title: Overtime hours YoY
labor.ot_yoy.description: Manufacturing overtime hours — an early labour-demand signal.

labor.temp_yoy.title: Temp help YoY
labor.temp_yoy.description: Temporary-help payrolls — leads the broader labour cycle.

labor.claims.title: Initial jobless claims
labor.claims.description: Weekly initial unemployment claims — a fast labour signal.

rates.y10_yoy_z.title: 10y yield YoY (z-score)
rates.y10_yoy_z.description: Year-on-year change in the 10y yield, standardised.

rates.oil_yoy.title: Oil YoY
rates.oil_yoy.description: Crude oil year-on-year — an inflation/cost impulse.

rates.dxy.title: US dollar (DXY)
rates.dxy.description: Dollar index; a stronger dollar tightens global liquidity.

housing.permits_yoy.title: Building permits YoY
housing.permits_yoy.description: Building permits — leads housing starts and activity.

credit.ci_standards.title: C&I lending standards
credit.ci_standards.description: Net share of banks tightening C&I standards; higher = tighter credit.

credit.ci_demand.title: C&I loan demand
credit.ci_demand.description: Net share of banks reporting stronger C&I loan demand.

china.pboc.title: PBoC balance sheet
china.pboc.description: PBoC total assets — a China liquidity proxy.
